title: CID
subTitle: Team CID deal with two lookalike criminals Arjun and Girish, who keep them guessing on whether they are twins or the same person trying to fool them. No one seems to have any information about them.

title: CID
subTitle: A man is shocked to see his friend's dead body replaced by another man's body. Soon, he calls upon the CID team for help, but he himself becomes the culprit.

title: CID
subTitle: When a woman takes a taxi to go drop off a package at a building but never comes back out, the driver, concerned, calls CID to the scene.

title: CID
subTitle: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. Together, they seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to solve various criminal cases.

subTitle: A girl is kidnapped on the eve of Ganesh Chaturthi. The CID team investigates the matter and discovers that she was an integral part of a conspiracy.

subTitle: As Dilip, his family and business partner Rohan mark their legal win at a restaurant, Anita enters and screams that Dilip will burn. After she is dragged out, Dilip's chair catches fire, killing him.
